interfaces.name: getOrganizationOverview
interfaces.description: Get high-level information about the ministry’s mission, vision, beliefs, and primary focus areas for the About and Home pages.

interfaces.name: getHomepageHighlights
interfaces.description: Fetch featured content for the homepage including highlighted events, lesson series, crafts, and child sponsorship profiles.

interfaces.name: getEventFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for the Events listing page including event types, age ranges, price bands, and session types.

interfaces.name: searchEvents
interfaces.description: Search and filter events for the Events listing page with support for type, date range, age range, price, location, and session type.

location_postal_code.description: Postal code to search near, e.g., '30309'

distance_miles.description: Radius distance in miles for location filtering

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort option, e.g., 'price_low_to_high', 'date_soonest', 'relevance'

interfaces.name: getEventDetails
interfaces.description: Get full event details for the Event Detail & Registration page including sessions and campus information.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: ID of the Event to display

interfaces.name: createEventRegistration
interfaces.description: Create an event registration for a guardian including multiple children, their selected sessions, and payment method.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: ID of the Event being registered for (from page context)

event_session_id.description: Selected EventSession for this child (e.g., Morning Session)

parameters.name: payment_method
parameters.description: Payment choice, e.g., 'pay_at_check_in', 'online_card', 'bill_me_by_mail', 'pay_later_instructions'

interfaces.name: getDonationPageConfig
interfaces.description: Get configuration and options for the Donate page including available funds, preset amounts, and payment methods.

interfaces.name: createDonation
interfaces.description: Create a one-time or monthly donation/pledge, including fund designation, dedication, donor info, and payment method.

parameters.name: donation_type
parameters.description: Type of donation, e.g., 'one_time', 'monthly'

parameters.name: fund_id
parameters.description: Selected donation fund ID, e.g., for 'Children's Bible Story Kits'

parameters.name: payment_method
parameters.description: Payment method, e.g., 'bill_me_by_mail', 'pay_later_instructions', 'online_card'

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Optional start date for recurring gifts (ISO 8601)

interfaces.name: getCraftActivityFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filters and sort options for the Crafts & Activities listing, including age ranges, topics, duration options, and difficulty levels.

interfaces.name: searchCraftActivities
interfaces.description: Search and filter crafts and activities by age, seasonal topic, duration, difficulty, and sort preference.

text_query.description: Optional keyword search within craft titles and summaries

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort option, e.g., 'most_downloaded', 'newest', 'shortest_duration'

interfaces.name: saveResource
interfaces.description: Save a resource (craft activity, lesson plan, etc.) to the current user's Saved Resources list.

parameters.name: resource_type
parameters.description: Type of resource, e.g., 'craft_activity', 'lesson_plan', 'other'

parameters.name: resource_id
parameters.description: ID of the resource being saved

interfaces.name: getSavedResourcesOverview
interfaces.description: Get all saved resources and existing collections for the Saved Resources & Collections page.

interfaces.name: createResourceCollection
interfaces.description: Create a new named collection (folder) to group saved resources.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Collection name, e.g., 'Easter 6–8 Crafts'

interfaces.name: addSavedResourcesToCollection
interfaces.description: Add one or more saved resources to a specific collection.

parameters.name: collectionId
parameters.description: ID of the ResourceCollection to add items to

interfaces.name: getCollectionDetail
interfaces.description: Get the details of a specific collection and the resources it contains.

parameters.name: collectionId
parameters.description: ID of the ResourceCollection to view

interfaces.name: renameResourceCollection
interfaces.description: Rename an existing resource collection.

interfaces.name: deleteResourceCollection
interfaces.description: Delete an existing resource collection (does not delete saved resources themselves).

interfaces.name: getLessonPlanFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filters and sort options for the Lesson Plans listing, including age groups and topic hierarchies.

interfaces.name: searchLessonPlans
interfaces.description: Search and filter lesson plans by age group, topic, scripture, duration, and sort preference.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort option, e.g., 'most_downloaded', 'newest'

interfaces.name: getLessonPlannerCalendar
interfaces.description: Get calendar context for a given month and year, including all Sundays for lesson planning.

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Calendar month number (1–12), e.g., 4 for April

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Full year, e.g., 2025

interfaces.name: createLessonSeries
interfaces.description: Create a new lesson series for a specific age range and month, e.g., 'April 2025 Parables (Ages 5–7)'.

parameters.name: number_of_weeks
parameters.description: Optional explicit number of weeks in the series

interfaces.name: addLessonToSeries
interfaces.description: Add a lesson plan to a lesson series, typically triggered from the Lesson Plans listing via 'Add to Series'.

parameters.name: lessonSeriesId
parameters.description: ID of the LessonSeries to add to

parameters.name: lessonPlanId
parameters.description: ID of the LessonPlan being added

parameters.name: initial_week_number
parameters.description: Optional initial week number; if omitted the lesson is appended

interfaces.name: getLessonSeriesList
interfaces.description: List existing lesson series for the Series Overview page, optionally filtered by month or age range.

interfaces.name: getLessonSeriesDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific lesson series including its assigned lessons and their week/order.

parameters.name: lessonSeriesId
parameters.description: ID of the LessonSeries to open

items.description: Sunday dates in ISO 8601 format for the series month

interfaces.name: updateSeriesLessonOrder
interfaces.description: Update the week numbers and display order of lessons within a series after drag-and-drop reordering.

parameters.name: lessonSeriesId
parameters.description: ID of the LessonSeries being updated

scheduled_date.description: Optional specific Sunday date for this assignment (ISO 8601)

interfaces.name: getProductCategories
interfaces.description: Get product categories for the Shop sidebar and navigation, including Curriculum Sets.

interfaces.name: getProductFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the product listing, including age groups, price range, and sort choices.

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: Optional ProductCategory context for narrowing options

interfaces.name: searchProducts
interfaces.description: Search and filter products by category, keyword, age, price, and sort preference for the Shop listing page.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Free-text search query, e.g., 'Fruit of the Spirit'

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort option, e.g., 'rating_high_to_low', 'price_low_to_high', 'newest'

interfaces.name: getProductDetails
interfaces.description: Get full product details for the Product Detail page including category and rating summary.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the Product to display

interfaces.name: addToCart
interfaces.description: Add a product to the shopping cart, creating a cart if it does not yet exist.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the Product to add

interfaces.name: getCart
interfaces.description: Get the current cart contents including items and computed totals for the Cart page.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of an existing cart item. A quantity of 0 may remove the item.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the cart by cart item ID.

interfaces.name: getVolunteerFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for the Volunteer Opportunities listing page.

interfaces.name: searchVolunteerOpportunities
interfaces.description: Search and filter volunteer opportunities by serve type, role focus, location, availability, and sort order.

location_postal_code.description: Postal code to search near, e.g., '30309'

distance_miles.description: Radius distance in miles for location filtering

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort option, e.g., 'distance', 'relevance'

interfaces.name: getVolunteerOpportunityDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific volunteer opportunity including campus and time slots.

parameters.name: volunteerOpportunityId
parameters.description: ID of the VolunteerOpportunity to view

interfaces.name: submitVolunteerApplication
interfaces.description: Submit an application for a specific volunteer opportunity including applicant information and preferred time slot.

parameters.name: volunteerOpportunityId
parameters.description: ID of the VolunteerOpportunity being applied for

parameters.name: availability_notes
parameters.description: Optional notes about availability (e.g., specific Sunday service times)

interfaces.name: getChildSponsorshipFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Child Sponsorship listing page including age ranges, amount ranges, and interests.

interfaces.name: searchChildProfiles
interfaces.description: Search and filter child sponsorship profiles by age, monthly amount range, interests, and sort order.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort option, e.g., 'longest_waiting', 'youngest_first'

interfaces.name: getChildProfileDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific child sponsorship profile including interests and story.

parameters.name: childProfileId
parameters.description: ID of the ChildProfile to view

interfaces.name: createSponsorship
interfaces.description: Create a sponsorship pledge for a specific child, including monthly amount, start date, and payment method.

parameters.name: childProfileId
parameters.description: ID of the ChildProfile being sponsored

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Sponsorship start date (ISO 8601), e.g., first day of next month

parameters.name: payment_method
parameters.description: Payment method, e.g., 'bill_me_by_mail', 'online_card'

interfaces.name: getNewsletterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available options for newsletter topics, email frequencies, and communication preferences.

interfaces.name: createNewsletterSubscription
interfaces.description: Create a parent newsletter subscription with child ages, topic interests, frequency, and communication preferences.

parameters.name: email_frequency
parameters.description: e.g., 'weekly', 'monthly'

parameters.name: communication_preference
parameters.description: e.g., 'email_only', 'email_and_sms'

interfaces.name: submitContactForm
interfaces.description: Submit a general contact form inquiry to the organization.

parameters.name: contact_reason
parameters.description: Optional reason code, e.g., 'general', 'donations', 'volunteering'

interfaces.name: getPolicySummaries
interfaces.description: Get summaries of key policies such as privacy, data use, and terms of use for the Policies section.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to retrieve the current Cart or create a new one if none exists.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recalculate cart subtotal, tax, shipping estimate, and total after changes.

helperFunctions.name: _applyEventFilters
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to apply filter and sort logic to Event queries for searchEvents.

helperFunctions.name: _applyProductFilters
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to apply filter and sort logic to Product queries for searchProducts.

helperFunctions.name: _applyVolunteerFilters
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to apply filter, location, and availability logic to VolunteerOpportunity queries.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateDonationProcessingFee
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to calculate processing_fee_amount when cover_processing_fee is enabled.

helperFunctions.name: _getNextDisplayOrderForSeries
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to determine the next display_order and week_number when adding lessons to a series.
